detail.title: Nov 2025 Product Innovation
detail.content:
Below are this month’s new Creator Center features and enhancements. These updates are designed to help your agency better coach creators, increase content output, reduce friction, and ultimately drive more GMV. --- ## 🔗 Product Relinking
**📌 What it is:** Creators can now replace unavailable product links without deleting or reposting their videos. **💡 Why it matters for agencies:** * Prevents loss of GMV when products go out of stock or are delisted * Keeps high-performing content active * Reduces creator downtime or manual content fixes ⏩ **Agency action:** Encourage creators to check their relink alerts daily and replace unavailable SKUs immediately. 🧠 Learn more in this [Feature Guide](https://seller-us.tiktok.com/university/essay?from=feature_guide&identity=1&knowledge_id=3759443559679790&role=2). --- ## ⏰ Showcase "Post Suggestions"
**📌 What it is:** Showcase now includes post suggestions, surfacing the most beneficial products to promote right now. **💡 Why it matters for agencies:** * Helps creators focus on SKUs with the highest earning potential * Improves conversion and GMV * Makes daily content planning more strategic ⏩ **Agency action:** Use this feature during creator check-ins to guide what should be posted next. 🧠 Learn more in this [Feature Guide](https://seller-us.tiktok.com/university/essay?course_type=1&from=search&knowledge_id=5640959860098862&role=1). --- ## 🎁 Increased Free Sample Requests
**📌 What it is:** GMV-generating creators now have access to more simultaneous sample requests, with even more unlocked as they scale. **💡 Why it matters for agencies:** * Supports multi-product testing for sellers * Enables faster content turnaround * Helps newer creators experiment and find winning products ⏩ **Agency action:** Encourage creators to request samples early, especially for seasonal or trending SKUs. 🧠 Learn more in this [Feature Guide](https://seller-us.tiktok.com/university/essay?course_type=1&knowledge_id=5764641632306946#EAC300D6). --- ## ⭐ Spotlight Creator Program
**📌 What it is:** A new growth initiative for Bronze-Platinum creators, offering additional reach, commissions, and sample benefits. **💡 Why it matters for agencies:** * Provides a structured path to scale mid-tier and rising creators * Makes creators more attractive to sellers * Enables your agency to pitch stronger creator value ⏩ **Agency action:** Identify eligible creators and guide them on how to maximize program perks. 🧠 Learn more in this [Feature Guide](https://seller-us.tiktok.com/university/essay?course_type=1&from=search&knowledge_id=7699130216220471&role=1). --- ## 👀 Brand Check for IPR Safety
**📌 What it is:** Products more prone to IPR issues now show no brand name under "About the Product" in the PDP. **💡 Why it matters for agencies:** * Helps prevent creator violations * Reduces violation warnings and penalties * Saves your team time spent on appeals or escalations ⏩ **Agency action:** Have creators quickly review PDP details before filming or linking. --- ## 🎥 Video Assistant: AI-Powered Content Creation
**📌 What it is:** An AI-powered tool that guides creators through scripting, filming, editing, and posting, all in one simple workflow. **💡 Why it matters for agencies:** * Helps creators produce more content with less effort and support * Improves quality and consistentcy * Great for scaling creators efficiently ⏩ **Agency action:** Recommend Video Assistant for creators who need help ideating or scripting. 🧠 Learn more in this [Feature Guide](https://seller-us.tiktok.com/university/essay?from=feature_guide&identity=1&knowledge_id=1144590806566702&role=2). --- ## 💡 Good Content Performance Insights
**📌 What it is:** The Good Quality Video Guide now has enhanced performance insights and guidance to help creators improve their video performance faster. **💡 Why it matters for agencies:** * Clearer guidance for coaching creators * Helps sellers understand what's working and why * Identifies performance gaps quickly ⏩ **Agency action:** Use insights in weekly reviews to refine content strategy with creators. 🧠 Learn more in this [Feature Guide](https://seller-us.tiktok.com/university/essay?knowledge_id=2512242345133837). ---
